## Implementation Summary

**What was built:** `findDuplicateOrderIds(orderIds: string[]): string[]` — a TypeScript function that identifies duplicate order IDs in a single O(n) pass.

**Approach:** Two-Set strategy. One `Set<string>` (`seen`) tracks every ID encountered; a second (`dups`) accumulates IDs the moment they're seen a second time. No counting needed, no sorting, no external dependencies. Spreading `dups` at the end produces the ded
